ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circuits" (
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circuit */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the circuit belongs to */,
  "circuit_name" TEXT /* Name of the circuit */,
  "circuit_description" TEXT /* Description of the circuit */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the circuit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the circuit was created */,
  "design_engineer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design engineer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the circuit (e.g., design, review, finalized) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the circuit was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the circuit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circuit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circuits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circuits_design_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_engineer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing analysis entry */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the circuit the timing analysis belongs to */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the timing analysis entry */,
  "slack" REAL /* Slack value in the timing analysis */,
  "actual_width" REAL /* Actual width value in the timing analysis */,
  "required_width" REAL /* Required width value in the timing analysis */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of timing analysis (e.g., Low Pulse Width) */,
  "clock" TEXT /* Clock used in the timing analysis */,
  "objects" TEXT /* Objects involved in the timing analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the timing analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the timing analysis (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the timing analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_analysis_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clocks" (
  "clock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clock */,
  "clock_name" TEXT /* Name of the clock */,
  "clock_description" TEXT /* Description of the clock */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the clock in Hz */,
  "performance_requirements" TEXT /* Performance requirements for the clock */,
  "phase" REAL /* Phase shift of the clock in degrees */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Jitter of the clock in picoseconds */,
  "duty_cycle" REAL /* Duty cycle of the clock in percentage */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the clock configuration was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the clock configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clocks_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the object in the circuit */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object (e.g., signal, register, logic block) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the object was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., design engineer, timing analyst, project manager) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing analysis data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES timing_analysis ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the circuit the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, reviewed, approved) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing violation */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the circuit the violation belongs to */,
  "violation_type" TEXT /* Type of timing violation (e.g., Low Pulse Width) */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date the violation was identified */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the violation has been resolved */,
  "violation_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the violation (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the violation */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the violation was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_violations_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_violations_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
